creator: t-matubara@miracle.ocn.ne.jp
text:
svn update(Revision 313696),Today

Since glib(2.34.3) was updated, it becomes a compile error. 

I will send a patch.

Best Regards.

Fix: patch is:



-#include <glib/gtypes.h>
+#include <glib.h>
 #include "cairo-dock-struct.h"
 #include "cairo-dock-manager.h"--yGciqHOIC8ZO0VP5sEbojpB4Ouemu8R6AnzmGWBEFAL6BBww
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

--- src/gldit/cairo-dock-keybinder.h.orig       2013-03-09 17:10:41.000000000 +0900
+++ src/gldit/cairo-dock-keybinder.h    2013-03-09 17:11:12.000000000 +0900
@@ -31,7 +31,7 @@
 #ifndef __CD_KEY_BINDER_H__
 #define __CD_KEY_BINDER_H__
How-To-Repeat: Always
